revision.text: {{navbar|Audio templates|plain=1|style=float:right}} * {{tl|Listen}} – sets an audio clip off from the main text ** {{tl|Listen image}} – sets an audio clip and an associated image off from the main text * {{tl|Audio}} – for inline sounds like pronunciations ** {{tl|Audio-IPA}} – a variant of this template to be used with [[International Phonetic Alphabet|IPA]] notation ** {{tl|Pronunciation}} – a shortcut for {{small|{{Audio|soundfile.ogg|pronunciation}}}} * {{tl|Spoken Wikipedia}} – for linking [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Spoken Wikipedia|spoken Wikipedia]] article versions * {{tl|Audio icon}} – adds only the small icon with no links * {{tl|Inline audio}} – adds a notice with link to [[Wikipedia:Media help]] {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{navbar|Audio templates|plain=1|style=float:right}} * {{tl|Listen}} – sets an audio clip off from the main text ** {{tl|Listen image}} – sets an audio clip and an associated image off from the main text * {{tl|Audio}} – for inline sounds like pronunciations ** {{tl|Audio-IPA}} – a variant of this template to be used with [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|IPA]] notation ** {{tl|Pronunciation}} – a shortcut for {{small|{{Audio|soundfile.ogg|pronunciation}}}} * {{tl|Spoken Wikipedia}} – for linking [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Spoken Wikipedia|spoken Wikipedia]] article versions * {{tl|Audio icon}} – adds only the small icon with no links * {{tl|Inline audio}} – adds a notice with link to [[Wikipedia:Media help]] {{Documentation}}

revision.text: {{navbar|Audio templates|plain=1|style=float:right}} * {{tl|Listen}} – sets an audio clip off from the main text ** {{tl|Listen image}} – sets an audio clip and an associated image off from the main text * {{tl|Audio}} – for inline sounds like pronunciations ** {{tl|Audio-IPA}} – a variant of this template to be used with [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|IPA]] notation ** {{tl|Pronunciation}} – a shortcut for {{small|{{Audio|soundfile.ogg|pronunciation}}}} * {{tl|Spoken Wikipedia}} – for linking [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Spoken Wikipedia|spoken Wikipedia]] article versions * {{tl|Audio icon}} – adds only the small icon with no links * {{tl|Inline audio}} – adds a notice with link to [[Wikipedia:Media help]] {{Documentation}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{navbar|Audio templates|plain=1|style=float:right}} * {{tl|Listen}} – sets an audio clip off from the main text ** {{tl|Listen image}} – sets an audio clip and an associated image off from the main text * {{tl|Audio}} – for inline sounds like pronunciations ** {{tl|Audio-IPA}} – a variant of this template to be used with [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|IPA]] notation ** {{tl|Pronunciation}} – a shortcut for {{small|{{Audio|soundfile.ogg|pronunciation}}}} * {{tl|Spoken Wikipedia}} – for linking [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Spoken Wikipedia|spoken Wikipedia]] article versions * {{tl|Audio icon}} – adds only the small icon with no links * {{tl|Inline audio}} – adds a notice with link to [[Wikipedia:Media help]] {{Documentation}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{navbar|Audio templates|plain=1|style=float:right}} * {{tl|Listen}} – sets an audio clip off from the main text ** {{tl|Listen image}} – sets an audio clip and an associated image off from the main text * {{tl|Audio}} – for inline sounds like pronunciations ** {{tl|Audio-IPA}} – a variant of this template to be used with [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|IPA]] notation ** {{tl|Pronunciation}} – a shortcut for {{small|{{Audio|soundfile.ogg|pronunciation}}}} * {{tl|Spoken Wikipedia}} – for linking [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Spoken Wikipedia|spoken Wikipedia]] article versions * {{tl|Audio icon}} – adds only the small icon with no links * {{tl|Inline audio}} – adds a notice with link to [[Wikipedia:Media help]] {{Documentation}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{navbar|Audio templates|plain=1|style=float:right}} * {{tl|Listen}} – sets an audio clip off from the main text ** {{tl|Listen image}} – sets an audio clip and an associated image off from the main text * {{tl|Audio}} – for inline sounds like pronunciations ** {{tl|Audio-IPA}} – a variant of this template to be used with [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|IPA]] notation ** {{tl|Pronunciation}} – a shortcut for {{small|{{Audio|soundfile.ogg|pronunciation}}}} * {{tl|Spoken Wikipedia}} – for linking [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Spoken Wikipedia|spoken Wikipedia]] article versions * {{tl|Audio icon}} – adds only the small icon with no links * {{tl|Inline audio}} – adds a notice with link to [[Wikipedia:Media help]] {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{navbar|Audio templates|plain=1|style=float:right}} * {{tl|Listen}} – sets an audio clip off from the main text ** {{tl|Listen image}} – sets an audio clip and an associated image off from the main text * {{tl|Audio}} – for inline sounds like pronunciations ** {{tl|Audio-IPA}} – a variant of this template to be used with [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|IPA]] notation ** {{tl|Pronunciation}} – a shortcut for {{small|{{Audio|soundfile.ogg|pronunciation}}}} * {{tl|Spoken Wikipedia}} – for linking [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Spoken Wikipedia|spoken Wikipedia]] article versions * {{tl|Audio icon}} – adds only the small icon with no links * {{tl|Inline audio}} – adds a notice with link to [[Wikipedia:Media help]] {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{navbar|Audio templates|plain=1|style=float:right}} * {{tl|Listen}} – sets an audio clip off from the main text ** {{tl|Listen image}} – sets an audio clip and an associated image off from the main text * {{tl|Audio}} – for inline sounds like pronunciations ** {{tl|Audio-IPA}} – a variant of this template to be used with [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|IPA]] notation ** {{tl|Pronunciation}} – a shortcut for {{small|{{Audio|soundfile.ogg|pronunciation}}}} * {{tl|Spoken Wikipedia}} – for linking [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Spoken Wikipedia|spoken Wikipedia]] article versions * {{tl|Audio icon}} – adds only the small icon with no links * {{tl|Inline audio}} – adds a notice with link to [[Wikipedia:Media help]] {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Audio_templates here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{navbar|Audio templates|plain=1|style=float:right}} * {{tl|Listen}} – sets an audio clip off from the main text ** {{tl|Listen image}} – sets an audio clip and an associated image off from the main text * {{tl|Audio}} – for inline sounds like pronunciations ** {{tl|Audio-IPA}} – a variant of this template to be used with [[:en:International Phonetic Alphabet|IPA]] notation ** {{tl|Pronunciation}} – a shortcut for {{small|{{Audio|soundfile.ogg|pronunciation}}}} * {{tl|Spoken Wikipedia}} – for linking [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Spoken Wikipedia|spoken Wikipedia]] article versions * {{tl|Audio icon}} – adds only the small icon with no links * {{tl|Inline audio}} – adds a notice with link to [[Wikipedia:Media help]] {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
